ohtani.title: Yamamoto, Pages fuel the Dodgers' 5-1 victory
ohtani.blurb: Yoshinobu Yamamoto twirls seven strong innings, while Andy Pages drills a two-run home run to lead the Dodgers to a 5-1 win over the Brewers

imanaga.title: Astros' three homers ignite 8-5 win over Cubs
imanaga.blurb: Jake Meyers, Nick Allen and Christian Walker's home runs power Astros' 8-5 win over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Astros' three homers ignite 8-5 win over Cubs
suzuki.blurb: Jake Meyers, Nick Allen and Christian Walker's home runs power Astros' 8-5 win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Austin Martin, Brooks Lee lift Twins to series sweep
yoshida.blurb: Austin Martin's game-tying double and Brooks Lee's go-ahead single lead the Twins to a 6-5 win over the Red Sox to complete the series sweep

okamoto.title: The Pirates tally three homers in win over Blue Jays
okamoto.blurb: Backed by home runs from Spencer Horwitz, Oneil Cruz and Esmerlyn Valdez, the Pirates defeat the Blue Jays 4-1

murakami.title: Devers' grand slam propels Giants' win
murakami.blurb: Rafael Devers' grand slam and Casey Schmitt's two-run homer lead the Giants to an 8-5 win

matsui.title: Ohtani's homer, four Ks propel Dodgers to 4-0 win
matsui.blurb: A gem by Shohei Ohtani, both at the plate with a home run, and on the mound secures a 4-0 shutout victory for the Dodgers over the Padres
